winner.headline: Stay Refreshed On-The-Go
winner.body: The ClearSpring Bottle keeps your drinks cold for 24 hours, perfect for students and commuters with busy schedules. Its leak-proof lid ensures spills are a thing of the past.

reason: This variant best follows the brand rules by being clear, practical, and trustworthy. It immediately identifies a problem and offers a direct solution, while also providing context and inviting action in a low-pressure manner.
